methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Nuclear Energy (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 8 same-sector peers exist in Nuclear Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy

data.narrative:
Hexana is a seed-stage nuclear energy company founded by Gabriel Lévy that has raised €21M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a nuclear energy comp universe of 11 peers—3 public (OKLO, NNE, SMR) and 8 private entities including Oklo, TerraPower, X-Energy, Kairos Power, and Nano Nuclear Energy.

The peer-median method is not applicable to this valuation. The nuclear energy sector contains only 8 private peers, but filtering for same-stage companies yields zero matches, adjacent-stage yields one, and similar-tier yields zero. The threshold for robust peer-median analysis requires at least three datapoints within narrow selection criteria. Applying an all-sector median would introduce material selection bias given the heterogeneity in development stage, technology maturity, and capital intensity across the nuclear peer set.

Given the constraint on narrow peer availability, triangulation via traditional comparable-company analysis cannot be reliably executed at this time. Alternative approaches—venture-backed cost-to-milestone analysis, bottom-up revenue modeling, or staged financing progression benchmarking—would require additional data not provided here. The primary uncertainty is the absence of sufficient same-stage or similar-scale private nuclear companies with disclosed valuations. Further valuation work depends on either expanding the comp set with less-constrained peer filters or deploying bottom-up methodologies specific to Hexana's technology pathway and development timeline.
